problem_statement: Dividing a dimensionless Quantity by itself raises instead of returning 1.
gold_context: [{"file": "astropy/units/quantity.py", "start_line": 120, "end_line": 135, "content": "def _divide(self, other): handle dimensionless division"}, {"file": "astropy/units/core.py", "start_line": 40, "end_line": 52, "content": "class UnitBase: __truediv__ for matching units"}]
patch:
diff --git a/astropy/units/quantity.py b/astropy/units/quantity.py
@@
+    if self.unit == other.unit:
+        return Quantity(1)
test_patch:
diff --git a/test_quantity.py b/test_quantity.py
@@
+def test_div(): assert (q / q).value == 1

problem_statement: Nested blueprint registration drops the parent url_prefix.

gold_context.content: def register(self, app, options): join nested url_prefix

patch:
diff --git a/src/flask/blueprints.py b/src/flask/blueprints.py
@@
+    prefix = parent_prefix + self.url_prefix
test_patch:
diff --git a/test_blueprints.py b/test_blueprints.py
@@
+def test_nested(): assert prefix == '/a/b'
